title: Farm Practices Survey consultation
body: "Announcement of planned changes and invitation to provide feedback on the future of the survey.  This consultation will run from 5th February 2025 and closes on 1st September 2025.  Please send feedback and comments titled “Farm Practices Survey Review” to farming-statistics@defra.gov.uk.  Defra statistics: farming  Email farming-statistics@defra.gov.uk  You can also contact us via X: https://x.com/DefraStats "
